languages.text: "Лорд-капитан, срочное донесение. Лорд Себериан направляется к Камере {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}Патента{/g} в сопровождении преданных ему лично людей. Любые попытки выяснить его намерения или окликнуть лорда не возымели успеха".

traits.locale_text: "Лорд-капитан, срочное донесение. Лорд Себериан направляется к Палате {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}Патента{/g} в сопровождении преданных ему лично людей. Любые попытки выяснить его намерения или окликнуть лорда не возымели успеха".

languages.text: "Lord Captain, urgent report. Lord Seberian is on his way to the {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}Warrant{/g} Chamber, accompanied by those personally loyal to him. Any attempts to ascertain his intentions or to hail His Lordship have failed."
languages.original_text: "Лорд-капитан, срочное донесение. Лорд Себериан направляется к Палате {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}Патента{/g} в сопровождении преданных ему лично людей. Любые попытки выяснить его намерения или окликнуть лорда не возымели успеха".

traits.locale_text: "Lord Captain, urgent report. Lord Seberian is on his way to the {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}Warrant{/g} Chamber, accompanied by those personally loyal to him. Any attempts to ascertain his intentions or to hail His Lordship have failed."

"Lord Captain, urgent report. Lord Seberian is on his way to the Warrant Chamber, accompanied by those personally loyal to him. Any attempts to ascertain his intentions or to hail His Lordship have failed."

"Lord Captain, urgent report. Lord Seberian is on his way to the Warrant Chamber, accompanied by those personally loyal to him. Any attempts to ascertain his intentions or to hail His Lordship have failed."

languages.text: « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine}, un rapport urgent. Le seigneur Seberian se dirige vers la salle de la {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}lettre de marque{/g}, accompagné de ceux qui lui sont fidèles. Nous avons tenté de déterminer ses intentions et de l'interpeller, mais sans succès. »
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, urgent report. Lord Seberian is on his way to the {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}Warrant{/g} Chamber, accompanied by those personally loyal to him. Any attempts to ascertain his intentions or to hail His Lordship have failed."

traits.locale_text: « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine}, un rapport urgent. Le seigneur Seberian se dirige vers la salle de la {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}lettre de marque{/g}, accompagné de ceux qui lui sont fidèles. Nous avons tenté de déterminer ses intentions et de l'interpeller, mais sans succès. »

languages.text: «Lord Capitán, tenemos una emergencia. Lord Seberian se dirige a la Sala de la {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}Patente{/g}, acompañado por sus seguidores más fieles. Todos nuestros intentos por averiguar sus intenciones o establecer contacto con su Eminencia han fracasado».
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, urgent report. Lord Seberian is on his way to the {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}Warrant{/g} Chamber, accompanied by those personally loyal to him. Any attempts to ascertain his intentions or to hail His Lordship have failed."

traits.locale_text: «Lord Capitán, tenemos una emergencia. Lord Seberian se dirige a la Sala de la {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}Patente{/g}, acompañado por sus seguidores más fieles. Todos nuestros intentos por averiguar sus intenciones o establecer contacto con su Eminencia han fracasado».

languages.text: “舰长大人，紧急报告。塞贝里安大人正带着他的亲信前往{g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}授状{/g}大厅。我们试探过他的目的，也尝试过联络他，但皆以失败告终。”
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, urgent report. Lord Seberian is on his way to the {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}Warrant{/g} Chamber, accompanied by those personally loyal to him. Any attempts to ascertain his intentions or to hail His Lordship have failed."

traits.locale_text: “舰长大人，紧急报告。塞贝里安大人正带着他的亲信前往{g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}授状{/g}大厅。我们试探过他的目的，也尝试过联络他，但皆以失败告终。”

languages.text: "Lord Captain, dringende Meldung. Lord Seberian ist auf dem Weg zur {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}Handelskammer{/g}, begleitet von seinen Getreuen. Alle Versuche, seine Absichten zu erfahren oder Seiner Lordschaft zu huldigen, sind fehlgeschlagen."
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, urgent report. Lord Seberian is on his way to the {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}Warrant{/g} Chamber, accompanied by those personally loyal to him. Any attempts to ascertain his intentions or to hail His Lordship have failed."

traits.locale_text: "Lord Captain, dringende Meldung. Lord Seberian ist auf dem Weg zur {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}Handelskammer{/g}, begleitet von seinen Getreuen. Alle Versuche, seine Absichten zu erfahren oder Seiner Lordschaft zu huldigen, sind fehlgeschlagen."

languages.text: "Lord Kaptan, acil raporum var. Lord Seberian, kendisine şahsen sadık olanlarla birlikte {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}Ruhsatname{/g} Odası'na gidiyor. Niyetini öğrenme veya Lord Hazretleri ile iletişime geçme girişimleri başarısız oldu."
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, urgent report. Lord Seberian is on his way to the {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}Warrant{/g} Chamber, accompanied by those personally loyal to him. Any attempts to ascertain his intentions or to hail His Lordship have failed."

traits.locale_text: "Lord Kaptan, acil raporum var. Lord Seberian, kendisine şahsen sadık olanlarla birlikte {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}Ruhsatname{/g} Odası'na gidiyor. Niyetini öğrenme veya Lord Hazretleri ile iletişime geçme girişimleri başarısız oldu."

languages.text: 「艦長様、緊急報告。セベリアン卿は、忠誠心のある者たちを従えて、証言室に向かっております。卿の意図を確かめたり、卿に呼びかけたりする試みは全て失敗しました」
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, urgent report. Lord Seberian is on his way to the Warrant Chamber, accompanied by those personally loyal to him. Any attempts to ascertain his intentions or to hail His Lordship have failed."
